title: Aeronautical Adventures
description: This is an adventure and exploration modpack focused around create aeronautics
body:
Aeronautical Adventures is a modpack that evolved from an older difficulty pack I was making called Hardship. The hard pivot from an ultrahardcore difficulty pack to a fun aeronautics powered adventure pack was primarily caused by my time playtesting Create Aeronautics.

This pack primarily focuses on utilizing create and create aeronautics to explore your world unlock powerful gear and defeat the ender dragon. Its made for SMP/Roleplay environments and shinanigans are heavily encouraged!

This pack is still a huge work in progress, please come to my [discord](https://discord.gg/97kUJWurRR) to report any bugs or talk about the pack in the Aeronautical Adventures channel.

Next major update I plan to add quests!

Github For Aeronautical Adventures Modifications: [https://github.com/Fusion-Flux/Adventure-Awaits-Modifications](https://github.com/Fusion-Flux/Adventure-Awaits-Modifications)
